facebook.content:
Have you ever struggled with feeling like you're not good enough or worthy in your marriage?

The truth is, our identity and worth are not found in our spouse's love or validation. 

As Scripture says, "You shall love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your mind. This is the great and first commandment. And a second is like it: You shall love your neighbor as yourself." (Matthew 22:37-39, ESV)
facebook.fullPost:

instagram.content:
"True freedom in relationships comes not from being in charge, but from being in submission. When we submit to one another, we release the burden of control and let the Holy Spirit lead our way.

'Encourage the young men to be self-controlled.' - 1 Timothy 4:12

Do you struggle with control issues in your relationships?

tiktok.content:
We've been taught to pray for patience, but what if God is waiting for us to use the patience we already have? 
Hebrews 10:36 says, "For you have need of endurance, so that when you have done the will of God you may receive the promise." Are you waiting for patience or using it to obey God's will?
tiktok.cta: Watch the full teaching → Link in bio
